channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in HTML (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in HTML nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 nicobailon/visual-explainer (5663 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nicobailon

📝 Repository: nicobailon/visual-explainer

📄 Descrizione: Agent skill that generates rich HTML pages or slide decks for diagrams, diff reviews, plan audits, data tables, and project recaps

⭐ Stelle: 5663

🍴 Forks: 388

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T19:33:52Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-06T03:42:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 HBAI-Ltd/Toonflow-app (3041 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: HBAI-Ltd

📝 Repository: HBAI-Ltd/Toonflow-app

📄 Descrizione: Toonflow 是一款 AI 短剧漫剧工具，能够利用 AI 技术将小说自动转化为剧本，并结合 AI 生成的图片和视频，实现高效的短剧创作。借助 Toonflow，可以轻松完成从文字到影像的全流程，让短剧制作变得更加智能与便捷。

⭐ Stelle: 3041

🍴 Forks: 370

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-29T10:25:45Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-27T04:00:14Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI (2468 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ringhyacinth

📝 Repository: ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI

📄 Descrizione: A pixel office for your OpenClaw: turn invisible work states into a cozy little space with characters, daily notes, and guest agents. Code under MIT; art assets for non-commercial learning only.

⭐ Stelle: 2468

🍴 Forks: 268

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: agent-collaboration ai-assistant dashboard flask mobile-friendly multi-agent openclaw phaser pixel-art status-visiualzation

📜 Licenza: Other

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-06T04:04:13Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 h9zdev/WireTapper (676 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: h9zdev

📝 Repository: h9zdev/WireTapper

📄 Descrizione: WireTapper is a wireless OSINT tool that passively detects and maps Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, CCTV cameras, vehicles, headphones, TVs, IoT devices, and cell towers, turning nearby radio signals into clear situational intelligence 📡

⭐ Stelle: 676

🍴 Forks: 90

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-27T15:23:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-25T00:59:49Z

]]>

item.title: 📝 IRNova/Nova-Proxy (663 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IRNova

📝 Repository: IRNova/Nova-Proxy

📄 Descrizione: یک پنل گرافیکی کاربردی برای ارائه اشتراک‌های Worker با پروکسی‌های ، Trojan و Warp به همراه زنجیره پروکسی، ارائه دهنده تنظیمات کامل DNS، IP تمیز و روتینگ پیشرفته برای کاربران تمامی پلتفرم‌ها با استفاده از هسته‌های Amnezia، Wireguard، Sing-box، Clash/Mihomo و Xray.

⭐ Stelle: 663

🍴 Forks: 104

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-19T07:51:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-04T01:59:23Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 xjtulyc/MedgeClaw (626 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xjtulyc

📝 Repository: xjtulyc/MedgeClaw

📄 Descrizione: Open-source AI research assistant for biomedicine — chat to run RNA-seq, drug discovery, clinical analysis, and more. Built on Claude Code with 140 K-Dense scientific skills, real-time dashboard, and RStudio/JupyterLab integration. | 开源生物医学 AI 研究助手，对话即可驱动转录组、药物发现、临床分析等工作流，集成 140 个科学技能与实时研究看板。

⭐ Stelle: 626

🍴 Forks: 345

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-24T16:45:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-06T03:58:39Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: katelya77/K-Vault

📄 Descrizione: 基于 Cloudflare 的 Serverless 聚合云盘。以 Telegram 为核心（支持 Webhook 直传与 2GB 扩展），并全面兼容 R2、S3、Discord 及 HuggingFace 等多存储后端。零成本构建你的全能私有数据金库。

item.title: 📝 dannymcc/may (109 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: dannymcc

📝 Repository: dannymcc/may

📄 Descrizione: May is a web-based dashboard application that gives you a neat and clean interface for logging your fuel fill-ups for all of your vehicles. The application has full multi-user support, as well as multiple vehicles per user. Whenever you fill-up your car or motorcycle, keep the receipt and record the data in May.

⭐ Stelle: 109

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: docker flask fleet fuel maintenance python self-hosted vehicle

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-29T11:55:26Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-27T01:58:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
